name: Fig Salad with Greens and Walnuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Quarter the figs or slice them into rounds.
2. Wash and dry the greens.
3. Make the vinaigrette (recipe follows) and dress the greens with just enough to coat them lightly.
4. Arrange the greens on 2 or 3 plates and lay the figs among them, along with the cheese and walnut pieces.
5. Spoon the remaining vinaigrette over the top and serve, lightly peppered.
THE VINAIGRETTE:
1. Combine the shallot; finely diced
2. Champagne vinegar
3. Salt
4. Extra-virgin olive oil
- OR Walnut oil
5. Taste and adjust the seasoning, if necessary.
